items.title: How companies use data to choose where to grow
items.businessQuestion: If a company is choosing where to open a new facility, which data categories should matter most: cost, workforce, infrastructure, technology access, or quality of life?
items.connection: This connects to Technology Orientation because business technology is not just software setup; it is the system of tools, data, and judgment managers use to compare options and make decisions.
items.discussionPrompt: Choose one business you know, such as a retailer, restaurant, healthcare office, sports organization, or tech company. If that business were expanding to a new state, what three data points would you want in a spreadsheet before recommending a location?
